requirement_topic.en: CODINORM and IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 Evidence for BESS

summary.en: CODINORM is Côte d'Ivoire's national standards and product-certification body. For BESS, the official public material reviewed did not identify a single CODINORM mandatory product certificate specific to stationary lithium BESS. IEC 62619:2022 battery-safety evidence and IEC 62933-series system evidence should therefore be treated as likely technical evidence for a CODINORM, tender, insurer, lender, customs, or project-owner review unless CODINORM, a contract, or a permit expressly makes a specific edition mandatory.
summary.zh: CODINORM是科特迪瓦国家标准和产品认证机构。针对BESS，已审阅的官方公开材料未识别到专门针对固定式锂电BESS的单一CODINORM强制产品证书。因此，IEC 62619:2022电池安全证据和IEC 62933系列系统证据应作为CODINORM、招标、保险方、贷款方、海关或项目业主审查中可能需要的技术证据处理，除非CODINORM、合同或许可文件明确将具体版本列为强制要求。
summary.zht: CODINORM是象牙海岸國家標準和產品認證機構。針對BESS，已審閱的官方公開材料未識別到專門針對固定式鋰電BESS的單一CODINORM強制產品證書。因此，IEC 62619:2022電池安全證據和IEC 62933系列系統證據應作為CODINORM、招標、保險方、貸款方、海關或項目業主審查中可能需要的技術證據處理，除非CODINORM、合同或許可文件明確將具體版本列為強制要求。

standards_or_laws: CODINORM normalisation and product certification services

summary.en: China-side BESS evidence commonly includes GB 44240-2024 for electrochemical energy-storage station safety and GB/T 36276-2023 for lithium-ion batteries for electrical energy storage. These may support a technical crosswalk, but they should not be assumed to replace IEC-numbered reports or CODINORM acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国侧BESS证据通常包括GB 44240-2024电化学储能电站安全要求和GB/T 36276-2023电力储能用锂离子电池。这些文件可支持技术对照，但不应假定可替代IEC编号报告或CODINORM接受结论。
summary.zht: 中國側BESS證據通常包括GB 44240-2024電化學儲能電站安全要求和GB/T 36276-2023電力儲能用鋰離子電池。這些文件可支持技術對照，但不應假定可替代IEC編號報告或CODINORM接受結論。

gap.en: Confirm the HS codes and CODINORM import/conformity route before shipment. Prepare an English or French clause matrix from GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 to IEC 62619:2022 and the relevant IEC 62933 parts, clearly separating formal IEC test reports from China-only GB evidence.
gap.zh: 出货前应确认HS编码及CODINORM进口/符合性路径。应准备英文或法文条款矩阵，将GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023映射至IEC 62619:2022及相关IEC 62933部分，并清楚区分正式IEC测试报告与仅中国GB证据。
gap.zht: 出貨前應確認HS編碼及CODINORM進口／符合性路徑。應準備英文或法文條款矩陣，將GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023映射至IEC 62619:2022及相關IEC 62933部分，並清楚區分正式IEC測試報告與僅中國GB證據。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific or mandatory only where CODINORM, customs, permit, tender, insurer, lender, utility, or contract calls up the standard or conformity route
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory where applicable in China; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 are recommended unless incorporated by regulation or contract

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 as required technical evidence only when CODINORM, customs, the buyer, or a project approval route calls it up; do not assume China GB reports are automatically accepted.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅在CODINORM、海关、买方或项目批准路径提出要求时，将IEC 62619 / IEC 62933作为必需技术证据处理；不要假定中国GB报告会被自动接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅在CODINORM、海關、買方或項目批准路徑提出要求時，將IEC 62619 / IEC 62933作為必需技術證據處理；不要假定中國GB報告會被自動接受。
